text_block_list.text:
The day has finally arrived. It's time for the
mysterious ball that Fuji Kiseki invited me to!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's about time. You've got some nerve
making me wait.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone's here now! I can't wait any
longer, so let's get going already! Vamos!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The art gallery's multipurpose hall is serving as
the venue. Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! We'll settle that dance battle from the other
day once and for all! Right here, right now!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I was hoping you'd say that!

The two dancers lock eyes and smile. I can feel
their intense passion from here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa and King Halo
text_block_list.text: To the ball!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The blinding spotlights, the crowd of guests... Ah yes, now this is a ball!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... don'tcha think this is kinda different from
what you imagined?

text_block_list.name: Cheerleader Girl
text_block_list.text:
Does everybody have their pom-poms ready?!
Let's see those dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Older Man in Happi
text_block_list.text:
Ho-ho-ho! Soiya-sassa! Mmhmm! My joints are
feeling good!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Cheerleaders and traditional happi coats?! Is
there no dress code at all?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, my darling ponies. Thank you for
coming.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Fuji! Um, what is with this... unique ball?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's a gathering of local dance groups that love
dance more than anything.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They all love to dance? All right! I love anything
that's fun!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, El. Are you serious? You can't talk like
that to people you've only just met!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's quite all right. Everyone here loves to
dance, so we're all kindred spirits.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Cha-cha-cha! ♪ Cha-cha-cha! ♪ I love it! You're
all so talented!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I do believe inviting you all was the right
decision.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is an event that transcends genre and
generations, so I've invited people from all walks
of life to come and have fun.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The concept is simple—everyone come together
and dance! And please do try to enjoy yourselves!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A gathering for everyone... So that's what Fuji
meant...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Then leave it to my first-rate self to show
everyone the perfect dance to really get this
party started!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's the way! I do know how hard you've
worked in preparation for today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Would you care to share a dance with me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'd love to!

King Halo and Fuji Kiseki perform a captivating
dance that draws the attention of everyone at the
venue.

text_block_list.name: Cheerleader Girl
text_block_list.text:
It's so beautiful! Their tails twirl whenever they
spin!

text_block_list.name: Older Man in Happi
text_block_list.text:
Wow, how elegant! It almost feels like we're in the
guest hall of a castle.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Everyone was captivated by your dance.
Many thanks for bringing joy to the guests.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I am the belle of the ballroom. The
shining star of the dance floor!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...You resembled nothing less than an angel who
had descended from heaven.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ngh?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: W-well, I am first-rate! Perhaps I just can't help being seen that way! Ohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh. So, everyone! Keep watching as I continue
to dance for you all!

King Halo has a dizzyingly fun time surrounded by
a crowd of dancers.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thank you very much! I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As did I. Thank you for such a wonderful time, my
dear pony.

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, young lady in the emerald dress? Do
you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But of course. How may I help you?

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear A
text_block_list.text:
We, the members of the Ballroom Dance Society,
would be very honored if we could share a dance
with you.

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear B
text_block_list.text: Indeed we would. Myself especially.

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear C
text_block_list.text: Mumble mumble... shuffle shuffle...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: W-wait, with all these people?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...No, what am I saying? If they all wish to dance
with me, the only first-rate solution is to dance
with everyone!

After doing just that, King Halo looks exhausted,
but very proud of herself.
